author: Rohan Santhosh
name: Single-GPU Blackwell port of 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240)
blurb: Non-record unlimited-compute submission on 1x RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition. Ports the merged 10L mixed int5/int6 + BigramHash(10240) recipe to a single GPU with automatic AMP/SDPA selection and a GQA fallback. Best exact post-quant roundtrip val_bpb 1.19349046 at 15,691,796 bytes.
